nasb.text: God has spoken in His holiness: “I will exult, I will portion out Shechem And measure out the valley of Succoth.

esv.text: God has promised in his holiness: “With exultation I will divide up Shechem and portion out the Valley of Succoth.

cnv.text: 神在自己的聖所說： “我必誇勝， 我必分開示劍， 我必量度疏割谷。

ccb.text: 上帝在祂的圣所说： “我要欢然划分示剑，丈量疏割谷。

csbs.text: 神在他的圣所中说： “我要欢跃，我要分割示剑， 我要测量疏割谷。
